description: A site-wide alert banner block rendered by the CMS as a fixed block; appears on every page but renders empty when no alert is active.

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Empty alert banner as rendered by the CMS when no alert is active

notes: Root element is a section (not div). Carries fixed id='block-alertbanner' and classes: block-alertbanner block block-fixed-block-content block-fixed-block-contentalert-banner. Accepts optional children. All 26276 pages render it empty.
